svg.title: Real-Time Threat Monitoring Backend Architecture
svg.desc: Architecture diagram showing data flow from Cisco FMC through Elasticsearch, aggregation service, WebSocket gateway to frontend dashboard

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What Cisco FMC APIs are used for threat data?')
sendPrompt('How does the Elasticsearch eStreamer consumer work?')
sendPrompt('Why use Redis for the event queue?')
sendPrompt('What aggregation logic runs in the threat aggregation service?')
sendPrompt('Should I use Elasticsearch or TimescaleDB for threat event storage?')
sendPrompt('How to implement the WebSocket gateway for real-time threat streaming?')
sendPrompt('What should the TV threat dashboard display in real time?')
